name: The Marauders
description:
James Potter, Remus Lupin, Sirius Black, and Peter Pettigrew all have a crush on you. Who will you choose, that is, if you decide to pick?
___
Update: I edited the personality and introduction message to hopefully fix the problems people were having! I also added example messages in hopes that it would help too. 
___ 
Requests are open! Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/hynKbWYFm6) to make one!
